name: INFO -Spirit of the Masai Mara Lodge has officially been sold to Turaco Properties Ltd_

origin.filename: INFO -Spirit of the Masai Mara Lodge has officially been sold to Turaco Properties Ltd_.docx

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A Fancy Dancy Transition 🎉 - New Chapter, Same Spirit
texts.text: A Fancy Dancy Transition 🎉 - New Chapter, Same Spirit

texts.label: text
texts.orig: While the animals are migrating, so are we—into something bold and beautiful. You became part of our story. And we’re not letting go—we’re just rewriting the next chapter.
texts.text: While the animals are migrating, so are we—into something bold and beautiful. You became part of our story. And we’re not letting go—we’re just rewriting the next chapter.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It’s time for a little bitter and a whole lot of sweet.
texts.text: It’s time for a little bitter and a whole lot of sweet.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Spirit of the Masai Mara Lodge has officially been sold to Turaco Properties Ltd. The new owners have taken over all lodge operations going forward, and we’re confident they’ll continue to offer magical safari moments that you—and your guests—deserve.
texts.text: Spirit of the Masai Mara Lodge has officially been sold to Turaco Properties Ltd. The new owners have taken over all lodge operations going forward, and we’re confident they’ll continue to offer magical safari moments that you—and your guests—deserve.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: As for Team Spirit? We’re not riding off into the sunset just yet...although we will still be chasing sunsets - We’re evolving! 🌍💫
texts.text: As for Team Spirit? We’re not riding off into the sunset just yet...although we will still be chasing sunsets - We’re evolving! 🌍💫

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Spirit of the Masai Mara brand will be transitioning into a tour operator, curating unforgettable journeys and experiences across Kenya and beyond.
texts.text: The Spirit of the Masai Mara brand will be transitioning into a tour operator, curating unforgettable journeys and experiences across Kenya and beyond.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To all our amazing Tribe partners and guests—we’re beyond grateful for your love, trust, bookings, and beautiful friendships. This is not goodbye; it’s just a spirited “see you soon” in a new way!
texts.text: To all our amazing Tribe partners and guests—we’re beyond grateful for your love, trust, bookings, and beautiful friendships. This is not goodbye; it’s just a spirited “see you soon” in a new way!

texts.label: text
texts.orig: P.S. My contact details remain the same— WhatsApp, email & smoke signals…. So don’t be shy & don’t be a stranger – stay in touch. 😊
texts.text: P.S. My contact details remain the same— WhatsApp, email & smoke signals…. So don’t be shy & don’t be a stranger – stay in touch. 😊

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With heartfelt gratitude and a touch of safari sparkle,
texts.text: With heartfelt gratitude and a touch of safari sparkle,

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lady Jane Kinuthia – The Queen of Awesomeness
texts.text: Lady Jane Kinuthia – The Queen of Awesomeness
